news.headline: NAT's Non-Exec Vice Chairman Alexander Hansson purchases additional shares.
Senior management of MT Højgaard Holding A/S report trading of shares as per EU Regulation 596/2014.
news.summary: Reported transactions involving shares and related securities by senior management members and their related parties have been disclosed by MT Højgaard Holding A/S in accordance with article 19 of EU Regulation 596/2014. The transactions data includes buying and selling activities and amounts involved, as required by regulatory standards.

news.headline: Ana Botín shares insights on finance's future in DIGI FULL episode on Bloomberg. Tune in now.
Trellix launches encryption upgrades to protect data from insider threats, safeguarding against unauthorized access.
news.summary: Trellix, a cybersecurity company based in San Jose, California, has unveiled enhancements to its Trellix Drive Encryption for both on-premises and SaaS management. This update provides customers with increased flexibility for deploying encryption protection to secure their data and devices against unauthorized access. Recent reports indicate that a significant number of lost or stolen assets in the past year led to data disclosure, underlining the importance for organizations to have robust drive security measures in place.

news.headline: Gozio Health partners with Hyro to deploy AI at Baptist Health, Jacksonville, reducing call wait times by over 3 mins and boosting service levels by 26%.
news.summary: In Atlanta, Gozio Health and Hyro have joined forces to enhance AI assistant deployment at Baptist Health in Jacksonville. This alliance has successfully integrated conversational AI into the health system's digital platforms, significantly reducing call wait times by over three minutes and boosting service levels by 26%. Baptist Health, the largest in North Florida, has seen substantial improvements through this collaboration.

news.headline: Trustate launches game-changing estate planning documents, becoming the only end-to-end solution; based in Tampa, FL.
news.summary: Trustate, a top player in trusts and estates management, has made a significant move by expanding its cutting-edge software offerings. The company, based in Tampa, Fla., has ventured into the estate planning sector by introducing innovative estate planning documents like wills, trusts, and other crucial planning tools. This development marks a major milestone for Trustate, making it the sole software provider with a comprehensive solution for trusts and estates professionals.

news.headline: Sanford Health chooses Availity for better revenue cycle management, uses Essentials Pro™ solution.
news.summary: In Jacksonville, Florida, Availity®, the largest real-time information network in the nation, has revealed a new partnership. Sanford Health has chosen Availity Essentials Pro™ revenue cycle management solution. This collaboration aims to streamline the health system’s claim and payment processing via an all-payer clearinghouse with pre-service, post-service, and post-adjudication features. Sanford Health's selection of Availity was expedited due to the company's expertise.

news.headline: Zip in 2024 processed $107 billion across 4M suppliers, benefiting global leaders like HP, AMD, Anthropic to streamline operations.
news.summary: In San Francisco, Zip, a prominent procurement orchestration platform, marked a successful year in 2024, solidifying procurement orchestration as a vital capability for contemporary businesses. During the year, the platform facilitated processing of over $107 billion in expenditures involving more than 4 million suppliers. Clients such as Hewlett-Packard (HP), Advanced Micro Devices (AMD), and Anthropic benefitted from Zip's services, enabling them to enhance efficiency and achieve tangible outcomes.

news.headline: TeleSafety reveals new workplace safety solution at Dirt World, aiming to reduce accidents and lower comp costs.
news.summary: Top civil construction and infrastructure development companies were recently introduced to innovative technology aimed at minimizing accidents and lowering workers' compensation expenses in Orchard Park, New York. On December 10th, 2024, TeleSafety, a trailblazer in workplace safety technology, unveiled their groundbreaking solution. This technology has the potential to significantly decrease workplace incidents and cut costs related to workers' compensation.

news.headline: Parallax names Jeff Eckerle as new CEO to guide company's growth and innovation, succeeding Tom O'Neill.
news.summary: In Edina, Minnesota, Parallax, a prominent provider of predictive forecasting and resource management software, revealed the appointment of Jeff Eckerle as its new CEO. Eckerle takes over from Tom O’Neill, the founding CEO, who spearheaded the initial growth of the company, positioning it as an innovator in assisting digital service entities in optimizing their team productivity. The platform developed by Parallax caters to professional services firms, offering advanced predictive features.

news.headline: Transportation Insight launches Margin Management in Beon Insight to track customer profitability efficiently.
news.summary: In Atlanta on December 10, 2024, Transportation Insight (TI) unveiled Margin Management as part of Beon Insight, its sophisticated data and analytics platform designed for various business requirements. This new feature utilizes data inputs and artificial intelligence to track and enhance profitability.

news.headline: HopSkipDrive expands to Atlanta after regulatory changes, bringing safe school transportation solutions to Georgia.
news.summary: HopSkipDrive, a tech firm addressing school transportation issues focusing on safety, equity, and care, is expanding to Atlanta. The State Board of Education in Georgia approved regulatory changes permitting school districts to employ small vehicle transport, benefiting Atlanta schools. This move provides schools with secure, dependable, and fair mobility solutions, supporting the company's mission.

news.headline: CFP Board set record with over 10,000 test-takers in Nov 2024; 3,755 candidates took exam, 6% passed.
news.summary: Over 10,000 individuals participated in the CFP® Exam in 2024, as reported by CFP Board. The exam took place from November 6 to 13, with a total of 3,755 candidates taking the test. Results showed that 6% of the candidates who sat for the exam passed.

news.headline: Dolfin completes $23 million TI lease for Applied Underwriters at Rockefeller Center, NYC.
news.summary: In New York on December 10, 2024, Dolfin, a groundbreaking financial technology company specializing in tenant improvement financing solutions, revealed the achievement of a $23 million tenant improvement (TI) lease for Applied Underwriters, Inc. This lease was a crucial step in supporting the operations of Applied...

news.headline: LG Electronics and University of Alaska Anchorage launch heat pump labs in Alaska for cold-climate HVAC research.
news.summary: A pioneering partnership between LG Electronics Inc. and the Consortium for Advanced Heat Pump Research has launched real-world laboratories in Anchorage and Fairbanks, Alaska. The initiative, announced on December 10, 2024, aims to enhance heat pump performance in tundra conditions. This collaborative effort seeks to optimize the efficiency and effectiveness of heat pumps, in a region where extreme cold weather presents unique challenges. LG's involvement in this consortium underscores its commitment to innovation and sustainability in the heating technology sector.

news.headline: InEight aims for FedRAMP approval to offer cloud construction document control solution to federal agencies.
news.summary: InEight has recently announced its initiation of the Federal Risk and Authorization Management Program (FedRAMP) certification process for its InEight Document software in Scottsdale, Arizona. This certification process involves rigorous security assessments and compliance checks to ensure the software meets the strict security standards set by the government. FedRAMP certification is crucial for software vendors looking to provide their services to federal agencies, as it demonstrates a high level of data protection and risk management. The certification process typically involves extensive documentation, testing, and evaluation, with an average timeline ranging from 6 to 18 months. For InEight, achieving FedRAMP certification for its Document software could open up new opportunities in the government sector and solidify its position as a trusted solution provider for federal projects.

news.headline: Marelli's Passenger Display with Privacy wins 'Challenger' at Digital Engineering Awards 2024 in Detroit.
news.summary: Marelli's Passenger Display with Privacy has been awarded the prestigious 'Challenger' honor at The Digital Engineering Awards 2024 held in Detroit on December 10, 2024. The innovative technology secured this recognition in the "Engineering Product of the Year" category. Marelli's cutting-edge display offers enhanced privacy features, revolutionizing the passenger experience. The award ceremony celebrated technological advancements, with Marelli's product standing out among competitors. This accolade solidifies Marelli's position as a leader in engineering and technology, showcasing their commitment to innovation in the industry.

news.headline: Rory Olson named MacDonald-Miller's CEO, established contractor with over 100 years of experience in the industry.
news.summary: A recent report reveals that the global poverty rate has dropped significantly over the past two decades. The number of people living in extreme poverty (defined as living on less than $1.90 per day) has decreased from 1.9 billion in 1990 to 689 million in 2017. This progress has been particularly marked in East Asia and the Pacific region, where extreme poverty has fallen from 60% in 1990 to just 3.5% in 2017. However, Sub-Saharan Africa still remains the region with the highest poverty rates, with 27.2% of the population living in extreme poverty in 2017. The report emphasizes the importance of continuing efforts to eradicate poverty globally.

news.headline: TransThera announces Phase I results of TT-01488, a non-covalent BTK inhibitor, for B-cell malignancies. Based in Nanjing and Gaithersburg.
news.summary: On December 10, 2024, in Nanjing, China and Gaithersburg, Maryland, TransThera Sciences announced its latest developments. TransThera, a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company, is dedicated to discovering and developing new small molecule therapies. This company focuses on meeting clinical demands and has reached the registrational clinical stage. TransThera is committed to bringing innovative treatments to market.

news.headline: Foresters Financial and KABOOM! team up with Boys & Girls Clubs of Fullerton to build outdoor playspace at Lozano Teen Center. 130 volunteers involved.
news.summary: Foresters Financial™ (Foresters), a global life insurer, recently revealed that more than 130 volunteers from Foresters, the Boys & Girls Clubs of Fullerton, and a national organization came together in Fullerton, CA. The event took place on December 10, 2024, showcasing Foresters' commitment to empowering its members to make a positive impact.

news.headline: Seeking Alpha introduces Virtual Analyst Reports, a new AI-powered tool for smarter investment research.
news.summary: Utilizing a blend of artificial intelligence and human insight, a financial research platform, Seeking Alpha, based in New York, introduced Virtual Analyst on December 10, 2024. Recognized for its innovative tools and community-driven analysis, Seeking Alpha aims to revolutionize stock analysis for investors.

news.headline: OAN announces Matt Gaetz joining prime-time lineup, investment boost for MAGA. Former U.S. congressman to start in January.
news.summary: One America News Network, OAN, recently revealed a significant investment in powerhouse figure Matt Gaetz by incorporating him into their prime-time lineup starting in January. Gaetz, a former U.S. Congressman with an eight-year tenure, will be joining the network.

news.headline: Monark Markets and Sydecar team up to offer access to private company shares for brokerage platforms. NYC-based Monark Markets and Sydecar form strategic partnership. Dec. 10, 2024. #Investments #Brokers.
news.summary: In a recent development on December 10, 2024, Monark Markets, a start-up company based in New York and backed by venture capital, revealed its collaboration with Sydecar, a private market infrastructure platform specialized in venture capital investments. Monark Markets is known for offering Alts-as-a-Service (AaaS) infrastructure. This partnership is anticipated to bring significant benefits to both entities and marks a notable strategic move within the industry.

news.headline: Babylon Bitcoin Staking Protocol raises cap to 1,000 BTC in Cap-3, following $2B+ TVL milestone.
news.summary: Babylon Labs, the leading Bitcoin staking protocol, has introduced Babylon staking Cap-3, significantly increasing the staking capacity within a 1,000 BTC block staking window. This development, based out of TORTOLA, British Virgin Islands, was announced on December 10, 2024. Babylon Labs is renowned for creating practical applications for Bitcoin, making it the highest staking protocol for the cryptocurrency.

news.headline: V10 Entertainment launches user-generated content library for licensing in industry post-2024. #VinDiBonaProductions #AFV
news.summary: On December 10, 2024, V10 Entertainment, the parent company of Vin Di Bona Productions and America's Funniest Home Videos (AFV), revealed the introduction of its vast user-generated content (UGC) collection for licensing across the industry. This move opens up opportunities for licensing collaboration with Home Video.

news.headline: MeasureUp is expanding globally with a new B2B eCommerce platform and seeking distributors in EMEA, APAC, and LATAM. AI-powered Learning Locker to be launched.
news.summary: With ambitions of expanding globally, the company has implemented a fresh distribution plan across EMEA, APAC, and LATAM regions, aiming to penetrate new markets. A significant upcoming innovation from the company is the AI-driven Learning Locker. The announcement was made in Miami on Dec. 10, 2024. MeasureUp, renowned for its practice tests and assessments, is striving to solidify its position as a key player in the industry.

news.headline: Global cloud-based quantum computing market set to reach USD 55.22B revenue by 2031 at 38% CAGR, according to Verified Market Research®.
news.summary: Leading provider Verified Market Research® is excited to announce the launch of its latest report on the "Cloud-Based Quantum Computing Market Size and Forecast." The comprehensive report provides valuable insights and in-depth analysis of the market, including key trends and forecasts.

news.headline: Rupert Resources Ltd changes fiscal year-end from Feb to Dec for better alignment with peers, with disclosures expected by Mar 2025.
news.summary: Rupert Resources Ltd, a company based in Toronto, has disclosed its decision to shift its fiscal year-end from the end of February to the end of December. This alteration is aimed at enhancing conformity with industry counterparts and external reporting obligations such as sustainability reporting. Consequently, the company anticipates submitting its annual disclosures by late March 2025.

news.headline: Becklar receives investment from Graham Partners, a private investment firm. Exciting news for the leading connected safety provider.
news.summary: In Boston on December 10, 2024, Becklar, a prominent company offering advanced connected safety and monitoring solutions, disclosed receiving an investment from Graham Partners, a private investment firm known for backing flourishing ventures. This collaboration signifies a significant advancement for Becklar as it strives for growth. The partnership with Graham brings new opportunities and resources to Becklar, showcasing the firm's commitment to nurturing innovative technologies. The investment from Graham is noteworthy for Becklar as it positions the company for future expansion and development in the competitive safety and monitoring market.

news.headline: ISNetworld chosen by Mondi Jackson to boost contractor safety. ISN to help centralize info and improve contractor compliance for operational safety.
news.summary: ISN, a top global provider of contractor and supplier information management services, recently revealed that Mondi Jackson, a subsidiary of the Mondi Group renowned for sustainable paper and packaging solutions, has picked ISNetworld as its main platform for managing contractor information. This move by Mondi Jackson aims to streamline contractor data and enhance compliance transparency, in line with the company's dedication to operational safety. This decision showcases Mondi Jackson's commitment to ensuring safety and enhancing efficiency in their operations.

news.headline: Edge AI software market projected to grow to $7.19B by 2030, with 24.7% CAGR from $1.92B in 2024 - MarketsandMarkets™.
news.summary: In Delray Beach, Florida, a report by MarketsandMarkets™ forecasts significant growth in the Edge AI software market. The market size is expected to surge from USD 1.92 billion in 2024 to USD 7.19 billion by 2030, showing a robust Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 24.7% during the entire forecast period. This growth reflects a strong industry push towards leveraging Edge AI technologies.

news.headline: Cardano's price drops by 12.19% in 24 hours, now at $1.01 from $1.2 past week; 17.0% decrease.
news.summary: Over the last 24 hours, the price of Cardano (CRYPTO: ADA) has dropped by 12.19% to $1.01, maintaining a downward trajectory seen over the past week with a decline of 17.0% from $1.2. The comparison chart illustrates the price fluctuations and volatility of Cardano in the last day. Detailed information is accessible on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Blue Cut Glasses in Austin introduces innovative sports eyewear for athletes in various sports, enhancing vision and protection.
news.summary: Blue Cut Glasses is a renowned provider of eye protection and vision enhancement based in Austin, Texas. As of December 10, 2024, they are at the forefront of the market with their cutting-edge protective sports goggles. These goggles are specially designed for athletes engaging in various sports such as pickleball, basketball, and tennis, both indoors and outdoors. Trust Blue Cut Glasses for top-notch eyewear solutions catering to the needs of athletes, ensuring both safety and enhanced vision during sporting activities.

news.headline: Stewart Title rebrands Energy Services Group to Stewart Energy & Infrastructure Group nationwide.
news.summary: Stewart Title National Commercial Services revealed the rebranding of its Energy Services Group as the Stewart Energy & Infrastructure Group. This expert network now functions nationwide due to Stewart's adaptability to market shifts. Erin Sheckler, the Head of National Commercial Services, highlighted this strategic move that aligns with Stewart's dynamic approach.

news.headline: Schneider Electric introduces AI-ready data center solutions in Mississauga, Ontario to address energy challenges.
news.summary: A company based in Mississauga, Ontario, Schneider Electric, announced today that they are speeding up the development of their complete artificial intelligence (AI)-enabled data center solutions.

news.headline: Infinitum to hold webinar in Austin, TX on right-sizing motors for energy optimization and cost savings for engineers.
news.summary: The city of Austin, Texas, is set to host a webinar by Infinitum focusing on optimizing motor sizes to enhance energy efficiency and reduce costs. This event aims to educate participants on the benefits of choosing the right motor size, ultimately leading to significant savings in expenses.

news.headline: Neuronetics and Greenbrook TMS close deal with Exchange Ratio of 0.01021 shares of Neuronetics for each Greenbrook Share.
news.summary: Neuronetics, Inc. (NASDAQ: STIM) and Greenbrook TMS Inc. (OTCMKTS: GBNHF) have confirmed the completion of their merger, forming the Combined Company. The acquisition involved Neuronetics purchasing all Greenbrook Shares through a court-approved plan of arrangement under the Business Corporations Act (Ontario). As per the terms, each Greenbrook Share was exchanged for 0.01021 shares of Neuronetics common stock at the closing of the transaction. The deal was finalized on Dec. 10, 2024, marking a significant milestone for both companies in the medical industry.

news.headline: Strider Technologies launches $300,000 scholarship program for Utah students in national security. Expanding educational opportunities.
news.summary: Strider Technologies, Inc. has revealed plans to allocate a total of $300,000 towards supporting students at Utah State University and Utah Valley University who are aiming to pursue careers in national security and intelligence. This initiative by the strategic intelligence provider marks a significant investment in the education and development of future professionals in these fields. The company's announcement was made in Salt Lake City on December 10, 2024.

news.headline: Report reveals $100B savings opportunity for US government in contract negotiations - NCMA's Contract Management Institute.
news.summary: Recently announced in Reston, Va., the Most Negotiated Terms Report 2024 has been released by the National Contract Management Association's (NCMA) Contract Management Institute and World Commerce & Contracting (WorldCC). This report has revealed significant insights into the negotiation trends, emphasizing essential data on how agreements are being structured in the current market landscape. It provides valuable information on key findings shaping negotiations this year, contributing precise metrics and analyses for industry professionals. With the collaboration of NCMA and WorldCC, this report aims to offer in-depth knowledge on the evolving contracting practices, shedding light on crucial aspects for effective contract management strategies.

news.headline: Dominion Energy Charitable Foundation gives $3 million+ to 318 nonprofits across six states, with nearly $2.4 million in Virginia.
news.summary: More than $2.4 million has been distributed to 171 nonprofit organizations in Virginia as part of grants awarded to a total of 318 nonprofits in six states. The funding aims to bolster a variety of causes including human needs, environmental conservation, education, and community development. The Dominion Energy Charitable Foundation based in RICHMOND, Va. made this announcement on Dec. 10, 2024.

news.headline: Duolingo and Netflix team up for 'Learn Korean or Else' campaign, featuring Duo the Owl and Pink Guard.
news.summary: The owl team member called Duo has partnered with the Pink Guard to issue a challenge to their fans. The partnership between Duo and the Pink Guard aims to engage and excite fans while also promoting unity and camaraderie among supporters. This collaboration has generated significant interest as demonstrated by a surge in social media engagement and a notable increase in ticket sales for upcoming events. The challenge presented by Duo and the Pink Guard has captured the attention of a large audience, with over 100,000 views on their promotional video in just 24 hours. Fans are eagerly participating in the challenge, with more than 10,000 submissions already received. The unique partnership between Duo and the Pink Guard is set to further solidify their bond with fans and create a memorable experience for all involved.

news.headline: Apranga Group aims for EUR 377M turnover by 2025, 7% higher than 2024, showcasing expansion plans.
news.summary: Apranga Group is aiming to achieve a turnover of EUR 377 million (including VAT) by 2025, representing a 7% increase from the projected turnover for 2024.

news.headline: Cognira partners with Schnucks, a large supermarket chain, to provide AI PromoAI solution to optimize promotions in 114 stores.
news.summary: A significant partnership has been formed between Cognira, a prominent enterprise Promotion Management solutions provider, and Schnuck Markets, Inc., a major privately held supermarket chain in the U.S. The collaboration will see Schnucks implementing Cognira’s advanced PromoAI solution fueled by artificial intelligence across its network of 114 stores. After assessing various vendors, Schnucks opted for Cognira’s solution to enhance its promotional planning, optimization, and analysis processes.

news.headline: Operation HOPE reveals Q4 2024 survey results showing low optimism post-election, marking one year of survey with insights.
news.summary: Atlanta – Operation HOPE, a nonprofit aiming to assist low- and moderate-income Americans in succeeding in the evolving economy, has disclosed the outcomes of The HOPE Insider survey for the fourth quarter of 2024. The latest quarter signifies a full year of survey operations, supplying vital information on the financial attitudes of Americans on an annual basis for the first time. Newly unearthed data for this quarter indicates that a majority of respondents are feeling less optimistic about their financial situations.

news.headline: DNA Ventures introduces a desk for tokenized equity in startups, enabling accredited investors to invest in Web3 startups via SPVs.
news.summary: Qualified investors are given the opportunity to invest in Web3 startups through tokenized special-purpose vehicles on the platform.

news.headline: New movie "And God Made Man" explores transgender athletes in sports, released by JC Films highlighting a faith-based perspective.
news.summary: A recent release by Sposi Novelli Productions and JC Films delves into a prominent issue of the year. Titled "And God Made Man," this movie spotlights the journey of Lindsay, a high school student, in Bridgeport, W.Va. Released on December 10, 2024, the film tackles significant themes while stirring up public discourse. This initiative from the Christian film producer illustrates a bold step towards provoking thought and sparking discussions among viewers.

news.headline: Husband-Wife duo bring Re-Bath to Albuquerque, serving all of New Mexico, celebrating development milestone.
news.summary: A prominent national company specializing in bathroom remodeling is marking a significant achievement by expanding its services to cover the entire state of New Mexico. Re-Bath, a major player in the industry, recently finalized an agreement in Albuquerque on December 10, 2024. This move represents a strategic step forward for the company as it continues to grow its presence in the region. With this new development, Re-Bath is now poised to cater to a larger customer base in New Mexico, further solidifying its position as a leading provider in the market.

news.headline: Leaders from Norway's sovereign wealth fund & Rockefeller University discuss investing in a volatile world.
news.summary: Norges Bank Investment Management and Rockefeller University leaders recently discussed strategies for allocating investments in today's volatile market during an interview with Bloomberg. The discussion highlighted the challenges of navigating uncertain market conditions, with global economic uncertainty and geopolitical tensions affecting investment decisions. The leaders emphasized the importance of diversification and risk management in their investment approach. Norges Bank Investment Management, managing over $1 trillion in assets, shared insights on their long-term investment strategy and focus on sustainable investments. Rockefeller University leaders discussed the impact of market volatility on educational institutions and the need for a flexible investment approach. The conversation underscored the importance of staying informed and adaptable in a rapidly changing financial landscape.

news.headline: Profound Medical closes US$40.25M offering with 5,366,705 Common Shares issued at US$7.50 each.
news.summary: On December 10, 2024, Profound Medical Corp. (TSX: PRN; NASDAQ: PROF) successfully closed its public offering of common shares at a price of US$7.50 per share. The underwriters fully exercised the over-allotment option, leading to the issuance of 5,366,705 common shares and generating approximately US$40.25 million in gross proceeds for the company.

news.headline: DX introduces DX Core 4, a productivity framework created by researchers to measure engineering productivity effectively.
news.summary: In Salt Lake City on December 10, 2024, a new engineering intelligence platform called DX introduced the DX Core 4 framework. This innovation aims to tackle the persistent issue of quantifying engineering efficiency. The DX Core 4 integrates DORA, SPACE, and other methodologies, providing a comprehensive solution.
